privacy.name: Privacy Check
privacy.description: Detect personal or identifying information that may be unnecessarily exposed.

academic-integrity.name: Academic Integrity Check
academic-integrity.description: Detect academic dishonesty patterns like outsourcing and concealment requests.

prompt-quality.name: Prompt Quality Check
prompt-quality.description: Evaluate clarity, specificity, and completeness of your prompt.

HomePage.title: Analyze your prompts before you send them
HomePage.subtitle: Choose an analysis mode to evaluate your prompt for privacy, academic integrity, or quality issues.
HomePage.historySaveFailed: Analysis succeeded, but history could not be saved in this browser.

HistoryPage.title: History
HistoryPage.emptyDescription: Your analyzed prompts will appear here.

RewritePanel.title: Suggested Rewrite
RewritePanel.hint: Use this improved version for better results

PromptInput.label: Enter Your Prompt
PromptInput.placeholder: Paste or type the prompt you want to analyze...

ScoreCard.riskFooter: Risk score from 0-100. Lower is better.
ScoreCard.qualityFooter: Quality score from 0-100. Higher is better.

personal_name_exposed.title: Personal name exposed
personal_name_exposed.description: Your prompt contains a personal name that could identify you or someone else.
personal_name_exposed.whyItMatters: Personal names combined with other context can be used to identify individuals, especially in AI systems that may log or process data.
personal_name_exposed.howToFix: Replace the name with a placeholder like "[Name]" or remove it if not essential to your request.

organization_exposed.title: Organization name exposed
organization_exposed.description: Your prompt contains the name of a school, company, or organization.
organization_exposed.whyItMatters: Organization names can narrow down your identity and may reveal sensitive affiliations.
organization_exposed.howToFix: Replace with "[Organization]" or describe the type of institution without naming it.

location_exposed.title: Location details exposed
location_exposed.description: Your prompt contains specific location information.
location_exposed.whyItMatters: Precise locations can be used to identify or track individuals.
location_exposed.howToFix: Use general descriptions like "a city" or "[Location]" instead of specific addresses or place names.

email_exposed.title: Email address exposed
email_exposed.description: Your prompt contains an email address.
email_exposed.whyItMatters: Email addresses are unique identifiers that can be used for tracking, spam, or phishing.
email_exposed.howToFix: Replace with "[email]" or describe the type of email format needed.

phone_exposed.title: Phone number exposed
phone_exposed.description: Your prompt contains a phone number.
phone_exposed.whyItMatters: Phone numbers are highly personal and can be used for unwanted contact or identity verification.
phone_exposed.howToFix: Replace with "[phone number]" or use a placeholder format.

id_number_exposed.title: ID or official number exposed
id_number_exposed.description: Your prompt contains an official identification number.
id_number_exposed.whyItMatters: ID numbers are sensitive credentials that could be used for identity theft.
id_number_exposed.howToFix: Never include real ID numbers. Use "[ID number]" or describe the format needed.

username_exposed.title: Username or handle exposed
username_exposed.description: Your prompt contains a social media handle or username.
username_exposed.whyItMatters: Usernames can link to real identities and online profiles.
username_exposed.howToFix: Replace with "@[username]" or remove if not essential.

other_sensitive_exposed.title: Other sensitive information exposed
other_sensitive_exposed.description: Your prompt contains other potentially identifying information.
other_sensitive_exposed.whyItMatters: Various details can be combined to create a profile or identify individuals.
other_sensitive_exposed.howToFix: Review what information is truly necessary and replace specifics with placeholders.

full_task_outsourcing.title: Full task outsourcing detected
full_task_outsourcing.description: Your prompt asks AI to complete an entire assignment or task for you.
full_task_outsourcing.whyItMatters: Submitting AI-generated work as your own undermines learning and violates academic integrity policies at most institutions.
full_task_outsourcing.howToFix: Ask for help understanding concepts, creating outlines, or reviewing your own work instead of full completion.

concealment_intent.title: Concealment intent detected
concealment_intent.description: Your prompt explicitly asks to hide AI involvement or make output appear human-written.
concealment_intent.whyItMatters: Attempting to conceal AI assistance is deceptive and typically violates academic honesty policies.
concealment_intent.howToFix: Remove concealment requests. Consider asking for guidance you can build upon transparently.

answer_only_request.title: Answer-only request
answer_only_request.description: Your prompt asks for direct answers without learning context.
answer_only_request.whyItMatters: Getting answers without understanding reduces your learning and may not help with future similar problems.
answer_only_request.howToFix: Ask for explanations alongside answers, or request step-by-step guidance.

minor_over_reliance.title: Minor over-reliance pattern
minor_over_reliance.description: Your prompt shows some dependency on AI for work you might benefit from doing yourself.
minor_over_reliance.whyItMatters: Over-relying on AI can prevent skill development and deep understanding.
minor_over_reliance.howToFix: Try the task yourself first, then use AI for clarification or review.

missing_task.title: Task is missing or unclear
missing_task.description: Your prompt does not clearly state what action you want the AI to perform.
missing_task.whyItMatters: Without a clear task, the AI may guess incorrectly or provide irrelevant output.

missing_topic.title: Topic is missing or vague
missing_topic.description: Your prompt lacks a specific subject or topic.
missing_topic.whyItMatters: Vague topics lead to generic, unfocused responses.
missing_topic.howToFix: Be specific about what subject matter you want addressed.

missing_output_format.title: Output format is missing
missing_output_format.description: Your prompt does not specify how the response should be structured.
missing_output_format.whyItMatters: Without format guidance, you may get long paragraphs when you wanted bullet points, or vice versa.
missing_output_format.howToFix: Specify format: "in bullet points", "as a table", "in 3 paragraphs", "step-by-step".

missing_audience.title: Target audience is missing
missing_audience.description: Your prompt does not indicate who the content is for.
missing_audience.whyItMatters: Audience determines tone, complexity, and vocabulary of the response.
missing_audience.howToFix: Add audience context: "for a beginner", "for a technical audience", "for a 5-year-old".

missing_goal.title: Goal or purpose is unclear
missing_goal.description: Your prompt does not explain why you need this information.
missing_goal.whyItMatters: Understanding the goal helps AI provide more relevant and useful responses.
missing_goal.howToFix: Add context about your purpose: "for a presentation", "to understand better", "for a blog post".

missing_constraints.title: Constraints are missing
missing_constraints.description: Your prompt has no length, depth, or other constraints.
missing_constraints.whyItMatters: Without constraints, responses may be too long, too short, or inappropriate for your needs.
missing_constraints.howToFix: Add constraints: word count, number of items, time period, level of detail.

weak_task.title: Task could be clearer
weak_task.description: Your task is present but could be more specific.
weak_task.whyItMatters: Clearer tasks produce more accurate results.
weak_task.howToFix: Make your action request more specific and unambiguous.

weak_topic.title: Topic could be more specific
weak_topic.description: Your topic is present but broad.
weak_topic.whyItMatters: Narrower topics yield more focused, useful responses.
weak_topic.howToFix: Narrow down your subject to a specific aspect.
